files.Title: WAYN.Games.MGM.Locomotion.Authoring.BaseCharacterLocomotorAuthoring<TProfile>.BaseCharacterLocomotorBaker<TAuthoring, TStateMachine, TStates, TContext, TInput, TStateData>
files.Summary:
Baker for the CharacterAuthoring. Converts the authoring data into one or more ECS entities with the following setup:

  1. Creates the primary character entity (manual‐override transform) and, if Playable is checked, adds a PlayableCharacter tag.
  2. If a ModelPrefab is assigned, spawns a separate “model” entity with: – PresentationGo (holds the prefab for rendering) – ControllingEntity (points back to the character entity)
  3. Applies the authoring transform to the character via LocalTransform.
  4. If a CharacterProfile is provided: – Generates or reuses a BlobAssetReference from the profile asset (and calls DependsOn so changes re-bake automatically) – Adds LocomotionInput to drive character movement from player input or AI Agent – Builds a CapsuleCollider from profile settings (CapsuleGeometry + CollisionFilter) and adds it as a PhysicsCollider blob asset – Registers the character with the physics world (PhysicsWorldIndex) – Adds LocomotionProfileReference (points to the blob asset), LocomotionData (initial velocity, jump count, etc.), LocomotionGravity (gravity multiplier) – Initializes the CharacterLocomotionStateMachine in the Falling state

files.Title: WAYN.Games.MGM.Locomotion.Authoring.BaseCharacterLocomotorAuthoring<TProfile>
files.Summary:
Serves as a base class for authoring character entities with locomotion capabilities. Designed to work with a profile of type TProfile, enabling customization of character movement and behavior through specific profile definitions. Contains shared properties and functionality for setting up entities related to character locomotion, including rendering models and defining state machines through further specialization. The class includes a nested abstract baker class used for converting authoring data into ECS entities with the following configurations:

  1. Associates the authored character with a profile asset (defining locomotion behavior and rules).
  2. Supports optional assignment of a prefab model entity for visual representation.
  3. Facilitates the integration of locomotion state machines, states, and custom contexts specific to the movement profile.

files.Title: WAYN.Games.MGM.Locomotion.Authoring.BasePlayerCharacterAuthoring<TInput>.BasePlayerCharacterBaker<TAuthoring>
files.Summary: Baker class to convert PlayerAuthoring into ECS entity.

files.Title: WAYN.Games.MGM.Locomotion.Authoring.BasePlayerCharacterAuthoring<TInput>

files.Title: WAYN.Games.MGM.Locomotion.Authoring.BasePlayerCharacterBakingSystem
files.Summary: A Unity ECS system that operates under the baking system filter. This system is part of the Locomotion.Authoring namespace and may contain logic related to the backing or processing of player character data during runtime.

files.Title: WAYN.Games.MGM.Locomotion.Authoring.CharacterFollowerAuthoring.CharacterFollowerAuthoringBaker

files.Title: WAYN.Games.MGM.Locomotion.Authoring.CharacterFollowerAuthoring

files.Title: WAYN.Games.MGM.Locomotion.Authoring.LocomotionProfileAsset<TProfile>

files.Title: WAYN.Games.MGM.Locomotion.Authoring.LocomotorAuthoring

files.Title: WAYN.Games.MGM.Locomotion.Authoring.MovingPlatformAuthoring
files.Summary: The PlatformAuthoring class is responsible for configuring platform components and their associated properties within the Unity Editor. It is used to initialize platform behavior by baking it into ECS-compatible components, such as Platform, Rotor, and Track.

files.Title: WAYN.Games.MGM.Locomotion.Authoring.PlatformAuthoring.PlatformAuthoringBaker

files.Title: WAYN.Games.MGM.Locomotion.Authoring.PlatformAuthoring

files.Title: WAYN.Games.MGM.Locomotion.Authoring.PlayerGoAuthoring
files.Summary: Most of the player components (camera, input, ...) still required MonoBehaviour. This authoring component has to be set on a game object prefab that will represent the game object side of the player and handle all MonoBehaviour interactions.

files.Title: WAYN.Games.MGM.Locomotion.Authoring.PlayerInputAsset<TInput>
files.Summary: The PlayerInputAsset is an abstract base class for defining player input behavior in a characters locomotion system. This class should be inherited to implement specific player input handling, such as mapping game inputs to a given input type. At runtime the asset is instantiated per player to allow caching of player specific reference (camera, etc...) in the asset instance.

files.Title: WAYN.Games.MGM.Locomotion.Editors.ScriptTemplates

files.Title: WAYN.Games.MGM.Locomotion.Hybrid.Components.EntityGoCleanup

files.Title: WAYN.Games.MGM.Locomotion.Hybrid.Components.GameObjectEntity

files.Title: WAYN.Games.MGM.Locomotion.Hybrid.MonoBehaviours.EntityGameObject

files.Summary: This system will spawn a game object for an entity It will create a bidirectional link between the two It will keep a reference to all the monobehaviour of the game object in managed component on the entity

files.Title: WAYN.Games.MGM.Locomotion.Hybrid.Systems.EntityGoTransformSyncSystem
files.Summary: This system keep the game object position in sync with its entity. We can't use burst in this system because we are iterating over managed components.

files.Title: WAYN.Games.MGM.Locomotion.Runtime.DebugDisplay.LocomotionDebugConfigBlob

files.Title: WAYN.Games.MGM.Locomotion.Runtime.DebugDisplay.LocomotionDebugConfigUtility

files.Title: WAYN.Games.MGM.Locomotion.Runtime.DebugDisplay.LocomotionDebugContactPoint
files.Summary: A recorded contact point for debug visualisation, stored in a dynamic buffer.

files.Title: WAYN.Games.MGM.Locomotion.Runtime.DebugDisplay.LocomotionDebugDisplay
files.Summary: Static debug drawing utilities backed by PhysicsDebugDisplaySystem. Methods no-op when the physics debug display pipeline is not active.

files.Title: WAYN.Games.MGM.Locomotion.Runtime.DebugDisplay.LocomotionDebugDisplaySystem
files.Summary: System that draws locomotion debug path trails and contact visualisations each frame using .

files.Title: WAYN.Games.MGM.Locomotion.Runtime.DebugDisplay.LocomotionDebugFrameCounter
files.Summary: Singleton component tracking the current debug frame index, incremented each fixed update.

files.Title: WAYN.Games.MGM.Locomotion.Runtime.DebugDisplay.LocomotionDebugFrameCounterSystem
files.Summary: Increments the singleton each fixed update so that recorded debug points use frame indices consistent with the fixed timestep.

files.Title: WAYN.Games.MGM.Locomotion.Runtime.DebugDisplay.LocomotionDebugImpulsePoint
files.Summary: A recorded impulse point for debug visualisation, stored in a dynamic buffer.

files.Title: WAYN.Games.MGM.Locomotion.Runtime.DebugDisplay.LocomotionDebugPathPoint

files.Title: WAYN.Games.MGM.Locomotion.Runtime.DebugDisplay.LocomotionDebugRecorder

files.Title: WAYN.Games.MGM.Locomotion.Runtime.DebugDisplay.LocomotionDebugStage

files.Title: WAYN.Games.MGM.Locomotion.Runtime.Mathematics.MathematicsHelpers
files.Summary: Collection of Burst-compiled static utility methods for locomotion-specific mathematics: velocity reorientation, displacement projection, slope angle calculation, and quaternion decomposition.

files.Title: WAYN.Games.MGM.Locomotion.Runtime.Physics.ClosestColliderCastHitCollectorIgnoreSelf
files.Summary: Struct for collecting the closest collider cast hits while ignoring a specific entity. Implements the ICollector interface to gather and manage collider cast hit results. Filters out results that do not meet defined criteria such as hits associated with an ignored entity or backface collisions. This is particularly useful in physics-related computations where certain entities need to be excluded, such as in character or object traversal and detection systems.

files.Title: WAYN.Games.MGM.Locomotion.Runtime.Physics.ClosestDistanceHitCollectorIgnoreSelf
files.Summary: Struct for collecting the closest distance-based hits while ignoring a specified entity. Implements the ICollector interface to manage distance hit results and filters hits based on custom criteria such as excluding hits involving a specified entity or backface collisions. Useful in scenarios where distance queries need to selectively exclude certain entities or object surfaces, e.g., during character or object navigation systems in physics simulations.

files.Title: WAYN.Games.MGM.Locomotion.Runtime.Physics.ClosestRaycastHitCollectorIgnoreSelf
files.Summary: Struct for collecting closest raycast hits while ignoring a specified entity. Implements the ICollector interface to manage raycast hit results and avoids processing hits that do not meet the criteria, such as hits associated with a self entity or backface collisions. Useful in scenarios where certain entities need to be ignored during raycasting computations, such as character locomotion systems in physics-based simulations.

files.Title: WAYN.Games.MGM.Locomotion.Runtime.Physics.PhysicsOperations
files.Summary: Collection of Burst-compiled static utility methods implementing the core physics operations used by the locomotion state machine: capsule casting, overlap resolution, step detection, and body-type classification.

files.Title: WAYN.Games.MGM.Locomotion.Runtime.Physics.PhysicsWorldExtensions
files.Summary: Extension methods for PhysicsWorld that provide body-type queries.

files.Title: WAYN.Games.MGM.Locomotion.Runtime.Profiling.ProfilerMarkerExtensions
files.Summary: Extension methods for ProfilerMarker that are conditionally compiled based on the ENABLE_LOCOMOTION_PROFILER scripting define symbol.

files.Title: WAYN.Games.MGM.Locomotion.Runtime.StateMachine.BaseLocomotionContext
files.Summary: Base context available to all locomotion state machine. Contains the minimal core state data (Velocity, Position, ...) and information (Entity, Collider, PhysicsWorld,...) required for locomotion state logic and platform handling logic.

files.Title: WAYN.Games.MGM.Locomotion.Runtime.StateMachine.ILocomotionContext<TProfile, TInput, TStateData>
files.Summary: Interface enforcing the minimal information need for the context of locomotion state machine. It enforces the encapsulation configuration, input, and state data.

files.Title: WAYN.Games.MGM.Locomotion.Runtime.StateMachine.ILocomotionProfile
files.Summary: Marker interface for locomotion profile data. Implement this interface on an unmanaged struct that holds per-profile configuration values (e.g. movement speed, jump height) baked into a blob asset and supplied to the locomotion job.

files.Title: WAYN.Games.MGM.Locomotion.Runtime.StateMachine.ILocomotionState<TStates, TContext, TProfile, TInput, TStateData>
files.Summary: Interface for defining locomotion states within a character movement state machine.

files.Title: WAYN.Games.MGM.Locomotion.Runtime.StateMachine.ILocomotionStateMachine<TStateMachine, TStates, TContext, TProfile, TInput, TStateData>
files.Summary: Interface that defines the structure of a character locomotion state machine, responsible for managing state transitions, physics integration, collision resolution, and other locomotion behaviors of characters.

files.Title: WAYN.Games.MGM.Locomotion.Runtime.StateMachine.LocomotionJob<TStateMachine, TStates, TContext, TProfile, TInput, TStateData>
files.Summary: Burst-compiled ECS chunk job that drives the full locomotion execute loop for every Locomotor entity in a chunk: inherit displacement, solve overlaps, handle impulses, integrate, collide-and-slide, snap-to-ground, and evaluate transitions.

files.Title: WAYN.Games.MGM.Locomotion.Runtime.StateMachine.LocomotionStateAttribute
files.Summary: This attribute mark an enum field as a Locomotion state. This is picked up by a source generator to generate the corresponding state machine dispatch.

files.Title: WAYN.Games.MGM.Locomotion.Runtime.StateMachine.LocomotionStateBehaviorDispatcher
files.Summary: Static dispatcher that invokes lifecycle methods on a zero-size default instance of TState. Burst devirtualises each call at compile time — no boxing occurs.

files.Title: WAYN.Games.MGM.Locomotion.Runtime.StateMachine.LocomotionStateMachineAttribute
files.Summary: This attribute mark an enum as a Locomotion state machine. This is picked up by a source generator to generate the corresponding state machine component and systems.

files.Title: WAYN.Games.MGM.Locomotion.Runtime.Systems.ApplyPostCollisionImpulseJob
files.Summary: Burst-compiled job that processes each pending post-collision impulse and applies the appropriate velocity change to the affected physics bodies.

files.Title: WAYN.Games.MGM.Locomotion.Runtime.Systems.CameraRigFollowControlledCharacterSystem.Singleton
files.Summary: Singleton component storing the camera transform array and the corresponding player entity list.

files.Title: WAYN.Games.MGM.Locomotion.Runtime.Systems.CameraRigFollowControlledCharacterSystem
files.Summary: A system responsible for managing the camera rig to follow the currently controlled character in a game scene.

files.Title: WAYN.Games.MGM.Locomotion.Runtime.Systems.CharacterContactSystem.CharacterContactClearMapJob
files.Summary: Burst-compiled job that clears the de-collision and velocity impulse maps at the start of each frame.

files.Title: WAYN.Games.MGM.Locomotion.Runtime.Systems.CharacterContactSystem.CharacterContactJob
files.Summary: Burst-compiled contacts job that classifies each contact body, disables the default physics jacobian, and records de-collision offsets and velocity impulses for character entities.

files.Title: WAYN.Games.MGM.Locomotion.Runtime.Systems.CharacterContactSystem.ExternalImpulse
files.Summary: Represents a velocity impulse applied to a character as a result of a physics contact.

files.Title: WAYN.Games.MGM.Locomotion.Runtime.Systems.CharacterContactSystem.Singleton
files.Summary: Singleton holding the per-frame contact data maps produced by .

files.Title: WAYN.Games.MGM.Locomotion.Runtime.Systems.CharacterContactSystem
files.Summary: ECS system that runs during the physics simulation group to intercept contact events between character colliders and other physics bodies, classify body types, and accumulate de-collision and velocity impulse data for later processing by the locomotion job.

files.Title: WAYN.Games.MGM.Locomotion.Runtime.Systems.CharacterFollowerSystem.CharacterFollowerJob
files.Summary: Burst-compiled parallel job that copies the followed entity's LocalToWorld to each follower.

files.Title: WAYN.Games.MGM.Locomotion.Runtime.Systems.CharacterFollowerSystem
files.Summary: A system responsible for updating the transformations of entities that follow a character within the game world.

files.Title: WAYN.Games.MGM.Locomotion.Runtime.Systems.ILocomotionSystem<TStateMachine, TStates, TContext, TProfile, TInput, TStateData>.LocomotionJobData
files.Summary: Aggregated data bag holding all component type handles and lookups required by the locomotion job.

files.Title: WAYN.Games.MGM.Locomotion.Runtime.Systems.ILocomotionSystem<TStateMachine, TStates, TContext, TProfile, TInput, TStateData>
files.Summary: Interface implemented by generated locomotion systems. Provides the contract for scheduling and running the each fixed update step.

files.Title: WAYN.Games.MGM.Locomotion.Runtime.Systems.PlatformMovementJob
files.Summary: Burst-compiled parallel job that moves platform entities along their configured track waypoints.

files.Title: WAYN.Games.MGM.Locomotion.Runtime.Systems.PlatformMovementSystem
files.Summary: This system updates the position and rotation of platforms.

files.Title: WAYN.Games.MGM.Locomotion.Runtime.Systems.PlatformRotateJob
files.Summary: Burst-compiled parallel job that rotates platform entities around their configured axis each frame.

files.Title: WAYN.Games.MGM.Locomotion.Runtime.Systems.PlayerGoManagerSystem.CleanUpControlledPlayerCharacterJob
files.Summary: Parallel job that removes destroyed character entities from each player's buffer.

files.Title: WAYN.Games.MGM.Locomotion.Runtime.Systems.PlayerGoManagerSystem
files.Summary: Manages the lifecycle of the player game object. It ensures it's instantiation from the prefab for every player. When a player entity gets destroyed, the cleanup component ensures the destruction of the camera rig game object.

files.Title: WAYN.Games.MGM.Locomotion.Runtime.Systems.PostCollisionImpulseClearJob
files.Summary: Burst-compiled job that clears the post-collision impulse map after all impulses have been applied.

files.Title: WAYN.Games.MGM.Locomotion.Runtime.Systems.PostCollisionImpulseSystem.Singleton
files.Summary: Singleton component holding the shared post-collision impulse map.

files.Title: WAYN.Games.MGM.Locomotion.Runtime.Systems.PostCollisionImpulseSystem
files.Summary: ECS system that dequeues and applies post-collision impulses accumulated during the locomotion job. Runs after the physics group to ensure all collision responses have been resolved.

files.Title: WAYN.Games.MGM.Locomotion.Samples.Locomotion.Runtime.FallingProfile
files.Summary: Contains parameters related to the falling behavior of a character in the locomotion system.

files.Title: WAYN.Games.MGM.Locomotion.Samples.Locomotion.Runtime.JumpData
files.Summary: Per-entity persistent data tracking the number of jumps performed in the current airborne sequence.

files.Title: WAYN.Games.MGM.Locomotion.Samples.Locomotion.Runtime.JumpingProfile
files.Summary: Defines the properties associated with jumping behavior in a locomotion system.

files.Title: WAYN.Games.MGM.Locomotion.Samples.Locomotion.Runtime.LocomotionContext
files.Summary: Represents the context for basic locomotion mechanics, providing access to profile data, input data, state data, and base locomotion operations. This is primarily used in the state machine system for character movement and physics interactions.

files.Title: WAYN.Games.MGM.Locomotion.Samples.Locomotion.Runtime.LocomotionInput
files.Summary: Input commands for the characters' locomotion.

files.Title: WAYN.Games.MGM.Locomotion.Samples.Locomotion.Runtime.LocomotionPlayerInputAsset
files.Summary: A specialized ScriptableObject representing a player's input asset for basic locomotion. This class provides the mechanisms to map inputs from a player (such as key presses or joystick motions) into meaningful locomotion values for gameplay behavior. It uses the camera's perspective to determine movement vector directions and handles actions like jumping.

files.Title: WAYN.Games.MGM.Locomotion.Samples.Locomotion.Runtime.LocomotionProfile
files.Summary: Locomotion profiles used to define movement behavior for a character for various states of locomotion, such as moving, falling, and jumping, as well as the overall physics profile of the character. It implements the ILocomotionProfile interface to enforce the minimal configuration required for the state machine to work.

files.Title: WAYN.Games.MGM.Locomotion.Samples.Locomotion.Runtime.LocomotionProfileAsset
files.Summary: A scriptable object to define the configuration for a basic character profile.

files.Title: WAYN.Games.MGM.Locomotion.Samples.Locomotion.Runtime.LocomotionStateData
files.Summary: Component containing state data for basic locomotion mechanics. This struct is intended to be used within the locomotion state machine to track and manage state specific data, such as jumping count, timers, etc...

files.Title: WAYN.Games.MGM.Locomotion.Samples.Locomotion.Runtime.LocomotionStates
files.Summary: Represents the different possible locomotion states for basic movement in a character controller system. This enumeration is used within the locomotion state machine to determine the active state of an entity and manage transitions between them.

files.Title: WAYN.Games.MGM.Locomotion.Samples.Locomotion.Runtime.LocomotionStatesLocomotionSystem

files.Title: WAYN.Games.MGM.Locomotion.Samples.Locomotion.Runtime.MovingProfile

files.Title: WAYN.Games.MGM.Locomotion.SourceGen.StateMachineSourceGenerator

files.Title: WAYN.Games.MGM.Locomotion.Tests.Runtime.Spawner

files.Title: WAYN.Games.MGM.Locomotion.Tests.Runtime.SpawningSystem

files.Summary: Authoring component placed on the Model GameObject to visualize the current locomotion state via mesh color. Bakes per-state colors into a and adds URPMaterialPropertyBaseColor to the entity for per-entity color overrides.

files.Title: WAYN.Games.MGM.Locomotion.Tests.TestCharacter.Authoring.StateColorEntry
files.Summary: A single state-to-color mapping entry for the debug color authoring component.

files.Title: WAYN.Games.MGM.Locomotion.Tests.TestCharacter.Authoring.TestCharacterCharacterLocomotionAuthoring.TestCharacterCharacterLocomotionAuthoringBaker
files.Summary: Baker that converts the authoring component into ECS components for the TestCharacter locomotor.

files.Title: WAYN.Games.MGM.Locomotion.Tests.TestCharacter.Authoring.TestCharacterCharacterLocomotionAuthoring
files.Summary: Authoring component for baking a TestCharacter locomotor entity.

files.Title: WAYN.Games.MGM.Locomotion.Tests.TestCharacter.Authoring.TestCharacterPlayerCharacterAuthoring.TestCharacterPlayerCharacterBaker
files.Summary: Baker that converts the authoring component into ECS components for the TestCharacter player.

files.Title: WAYN.Games.MGM.Locomotion.Tests.TestCharacter.Authoring.TestCharacterPlayerCharacterAuthoring
files.Summary: Authoring component for baking a TestCharacter player entity.

files.Title: WAYN.Games.MGM.Locomotion.Tests.TestCharacter.Authoring.TestInputAuthoring.TestInputBaker
files.Summary: Baker that converts into a component.

files.Title: WAYN.Games.MGM.Locomotion.Tests.TestCharacter.Authoring.TestInputAuthoring
files.Summary: Authoring component that bakes a component onto the entity for keyboard-driven test input.

files.Title: WAYN.Games.MGM.Locomotion.Tests.TestCharacter.Runtime.ITestCharacterStateLocomotionSystem
files.Summary: Concrete locomotion system interface for the TestCharacterState state machine.

files.Title: WAYN.Games.MGM.Locomotion.Tests.TestCharacter.Runtime.StateColorBlob
files.Summary: Blob storing one color per state index.

files.Title: WAYN.Games.MGM.Locomotion.Tests.TestCharacter.Runtime.StateColorDebugConfig
files.Summary: Per-entity reference to the state color blob asset used for debug color visualization.

files.Title: WAYN.Games.MGM.Locomotion.Tests.TestCharacter.Runtime.StateColorDebugSystem
files.Summary: Updates URPMaterialPropertyBaseColor on Model entities each frame based on the current locomotion state of their followed Locomotor entity, using blob data.

files.Title: WAYN.Games.MGM.Locomotion.Tests.TestCharacter.Runtime.TestCharacterContext
files.Summary: Represents the context for TestCharacter locomotion mechanics, providing access to profile data, input data, state data, and base locomotion operations.

files.Title: WAYN.Games.MGM.Locomotion.Tests.TestCharacter.Runtime.TestCharacterFallingProfile
files.Summary: Contains parameters related to the falling behavior of a character.

files.Title: WAYN.Games.MGM.Locomotion.Tests.TestCharacter.Runtime.TestCharacterInput
files.Summary: Input data for the TestCharacter locomotion state machine.

files.Title: WAYN.Games.MGM.Locomotion.Tests.TestCharacter.Runtime.TestCharacterJumpData
files.Summary: Per-entity persistent data tracking the number of jumps performed in the current airborne sequence.

files.Title: WAYN.Games.MGM.Locomotion.Tests.TestCharacter.Runtime.TestCharacterJumpingProfile
files.Summary: Defines the properties associated with jumping behavior.

files.Title: WAYN.Games.MGM.Locomotion.Tests.TestCharacter.Runtime.TestCharacterLocomotionSystem
files.Summary: ECS system that schedules the locomotion job for all TestCharacter locomotor entities each fixed update.

files.Title: WAYN.Games.MGM.Locomotion.Tests.TestCharacter.Runtime.TestCharacterMovingProfile
files.Summary: Settings governing basic movement behavior (speed, acceleration, turning).

files.Title: WAYN.Games.MGM.Locomotion.Tests.TestCharacter.Runtime.TestCharacterPlayerInputAsset
files.Summary: A specialized ScriptableObject representing a player's input asset for TestCharacter locomotion.

files.Title: WAYN.Games.MGM.Locomotion.Tests.TestCharacter.Runtime.TestCharacterProfile
files.Summary: Locomotion profiles used to define movement behavior for the TestCharacter state machine. Implements the ILocomotionProfile interface to enforce the minimal configuration required.

files.Title: WAYN.Games.MGM.Locomotion.Tests.TestCharacter.Runtime.TestCharacterProfileAsset
files.Summary: A scriptable object to define the configuration for a TestCharacter profile.

files.Title: WAYN.Games.MGM.Locomotion.Tests.TestCharacter.Runtime.TestCharacterStateData
files.Summary: Component containing state data for TestCharacter locomotion mechanics.

files.Title: WAYN.Games.MGM.Locomotion.Tests.TestCharacter.Runtime.TestCharacterStates
files.Summary: Represents the different possible locomotion states for the TestCharacter state machine.

files.Title: WAYN.Games.MGM.Locomotion.Tests.TestCharacter.Runtime.TestInput
files.Summary: Component holding test input values for keyboard-driven character control.

files.Title: WAYN.Games.MGM.Locomotion.Tests.TestCharacter.Runtime.TestInputSystem
files.Summary: Reads and writes to each frame. Uses Keyboard.current for jump input, so cannot be Burst-compiled.
